sample.title: Mad Money 06/25/26 | Audio Only
sample.description:
Listen to Jim Cramer’s personal guide through the confusing jungle of Wall Street investing, navigating through opportunities and pitfalls with one goal in mind - to help you make money.

sample.title: FedEx Freight posts first earnings report since FedEx spinoff
sample.description: CNBC's Frank Holland has the numbers from FedEx Freight's first earnings report since its spinoff from FedEx.

sample.title: Dan Ives: Apple had to raise prices and this was the right time
sample.description: Dan Ives, Wedbush Securities, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss Apple's latest price hikes, why the company decided to make the decision now and much more.

sample.title: Apple suffers worst day since April 2025 as price hikes fuel iPhone fears
sample.description: CNBC’s MacKenzie Sigalos reports on why investors see Apple’s Mac and iPad increases as a test run for potential iPhone hikes before Tim Cook steps down as CEO.

sample.title: Apple posts worst day in over a year after MacBook and iPad price hikes
sample.description: Apple posted its worst day since April 2025 after announcing price hikes on MacBooks and iPads on Thursday. CNBC's MacKenzie Sigalos has the details.

sample.title: Venezuela races to rescue hundreds trapped after major twin quakes
sample.description:
Hundreds of people in Venezuela were trapped under rubble and many more remained unaccounted for, after two powerful earthquakes devastated areas in and around the capital Caracas, killing more than 230 people and damaging hundreds of buildings.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #venezuela #earthquake #caracas

sample.title: Samsung to unveil $648 billion South Korea investments: report
sample.description:
Samsung Group will announce on June 29 plans to invest $648 billion in South Korea over 10 years, including a potential $194 billion to build chip factories in the southwest of the country, a media report said.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #samsung #southkorea #chips

sample.title: Ecuador fans celebrate dramatic 2-1 comeback win over Germany
sample.description:
Jubilation swept through Quito as Ecuador fans celebrated a dramatic 2-1 comeback victory over Germany that sent their team into the World Cup last 32. Meanwhile, match-going fans could hardly believe what they’d just witnessed.
